prompt: Storyboard — colored. The troll is walking alone in the mountains, through snow and wind. He gets back home to his cave, all exhausted. The troll spots a tiny flower in a beam of light on a ridge outside the cave. Add a shot where focus is on the flower, then focus shifts to the troll and he says "what is this?" in a deep troll voice. He goes in really close and sniffs. He smiles and picks up the little flower, including the dirt around it. Ensure shots are cinematic and have great composition. We don't need the troll in every shot. Include text and instructions.
